_note: Covers the complete HTTP routing and handler matching pipeline. PathMatcher stores registered endpoints and locates them by URI (findEntries/findFirstEntry). PathParser compiles route patterns into regexes and extracts path params. ParsedEndpoint binds an Endpoint to its PathParser. InternalRouter is the central router facade; addHttpEndpoint is the single registration entry point for all routes. JavalinDefaultRoutingApi provides the public verb API (get/post/put/before/after). Verified by grep in javalin/src/main/java/io/javalin/ at 7078afc.
